analysis.consistency: High. The structure adheres to standard D&D 5e spell descriptions. All required fields are present and logically populated.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, the mechanics (d4 bonus to attack rolls/saving throws) are standard, and the scaling rule is precisely defined.

mechanics.core_effect: Grants a d4 bonus to attack rolls and saving throws for up to three targets.
mechanics.scaling: The spell gains one additional target for each spell slot level above 1st (e.g., 2nd level slot targets 4 creatures, 3rd level slot targets 5 creatures, etc.). This scaling is well-defined.
mechanics.components: Includes a material component, which is explicitly listed as consumed only via the description ('a sprinkling of holy water'), implying it is generally not consumed upon casting unless the description specifies otherwise (which it doesn't explicitly for consumption, typical for this type of M component).
